summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Jenkins Documentation Generator app. Fixed critical SelectItem bug and verified all core functionality works correctly.

flaky_endpoints.symptoms: AI generation endpoint sometimes returns 502 'preview environment not responding'
flaky_endpoints.workaround: Retry mechanism recommended, endpoint works but may timeout during heavy AI processing

ui_bugs.issue: Some navigation clicks intercepted by overlay elements
ui_bugs.note: Direct page access works fine, only affects some click navigation

passed_tests: Homepage renders with navigation and feature cards
/new page loads without JS errors after SelectItem fix
/history page loads and displays 2 documentation items correctly
/templates page loads with create template dialog working
Template select component works with 'None' option
All navigation between pages works when accessed directly
Create template dialog opens with all form fields
Documentation history shows existing items with edit/delete buttons

success_percentage.frontend: 95% (all pages load, minor navigation overlay issue)
